source: USAspending.gov + SOCOM PAO + DoD contract database
note: All leads sourced from public federal procurement records. Contact approval required before any outreach. Verify names via LinkedIn/Apollo before first touch.

leads.name: Business Development Director
leads.intel: CRITICAL RECOMPETE: $83.4M WHS/OSD Strategic Communications & Admin Support contract EXPIRED July 2025. Active recompete window open NOW. LMI is the incumbent — they will be scrambling to rebuild and partner. Angle: Trestleboard as narrative/AI content subcontractor on recompete bid. Contact BD or Capture team.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com LMI Consulting strategic communications director
leads.approach: TEAMING — Position as AI-native subcontractor on their OSD recompete. Lead with 99.7% faster narrative production and IG-ready audit trail.

leads.name: VP Strategic Communications
leads.intel: RECOMPETE WINDOW: $48.7M USAF Info Ops / Applied Research contract EXPIRED Sept 2025. HII Mission Technologies (formerly Alion Science) is a top-tier DoD contractor. Angle: Team on USAF narrative/IO recompete. HII has deep USSOCOM relationships.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com HII Mission Technologies strategic communications capture manager
leads.approach: TEAMING — Strategic communications/narrative as add-on to their IO portfolio. Reference USAF contested information environment doctrine.

leads.name: Program Director
leads.intel: HOT: $39.2M Defense Health Agency program management/comms contract EXPIRED Feb 2026. Deloitte DHA practice will be recompeting or pivoting. DHA is one of DoD's largest communications buyers. Contact DHA practice BD lead.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com Deloitte Defense Health Agency strategic communications director
leads.approach: TEAMING — Offer AI narrative production as differentiator in Deloitte's DHA recompete package. Frame as constituent communications accelerator.

leads.name: Contracts & Capture Manager
leads.intel: URGENT: $32.4M USAF IT/comms application support contract expires March 2026 — in active recompete window RIGHT NOW. CACI is a major prime — teaming opportunity for Trestleboard's narrative/comms layer. CACI has existing PAO and IO programs across all service branches.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com CACI Federal strategic communications Air Force capture
leads.approach: TEAMING — Pitch as rapid narrative/content subcontractor on USAF recompete. CACI already knows the space; position Trestleboard as their AI edge.

leads.name: Director of Strategic Communications
leads.intel: EXPIRING: $15.95M DHA Director/DAG Strategic Communications, Engagements, Protocol & Archives contract expires March 2026 — THIS MONTH. Chickasaw Aerospace is an 8(a) small business — they may be losing this contract or recompeting. Trestleboard can position as successor or teaming partner.
leads.approach: DIRECT APPROACH or TEAMING — This contract is ending THIS MONTH. DHA will need a replacement. Trestleboard can pitch DHA directly or help Chickasaw on transition.

leads.name: BD Director
leads.intel: $25.8M DISA IT/comms support contract expired Feb 2026. Small business — may be looking for teaming partners or successor vehicles. DISA is a heavy comms buyer. Command Post Technologies specializes in C2 and comms systems.
leads.approach: TEAMING — Approach as AI-native narrative partner for DISA recompete effort.

leads.source: USAspending.gov — Ipsos Public Affairs Active Contract
leads.name: Federal Practice Leader
leads.intel: $35.2M DHA public affairs & program support contract active through Nov 2026. Ipsos is a global research firm — they hold this through a professional services vehicle. Their DHA practice director would be a strategic relationship. Trestleboard could position as AI narrative layer under Ipsos prime.
leads.approach: PARTNERSHIP — Ipsos does research; Trestleboard does narrative production. Complementary. Pitch as their content execution arm for DHA contract.

leads.name: Program Manager
leads.intel: $9.53M Navy administrative/comms support contract through Aug 2026. Next Intelligence Solutions is a small veteran-owned business — strong alignment with Trestleboard's veteran-adjacent positioning. Recompete window opens ~early 2026.
leads.approach: TEAMING — Small business alignment. Pitch recompete teaming. Shared veteran/DoD community positioning.

leads.name: Director of Communications Programs
leads.intel: $9.3M USAF Professional Communications Support contract through June 2027. PSC code R699 = direct comms professional services. This is one of the cleanest contract matches to Trestleboard's capability. ITS JV is a joint venture — likely looking to grow.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com 'Innovative Technology Solutions' Air Force communications
leads.approach: TEAMING — Direct PSC match. Position as AI narrative subcontractor on their USAF communications programs.

leads.name: Director, Strategic Communications
leads.intel: DHA is one of the most active DoD comms buyers — multiple large contracts (Ipsos $35M, D7 $18.7M, Chickasaw $15.9M, Rack-Wildner $12.9M). Multiple contracts expiring 2026 = active procurement cycle. Target: DHA Office of Communications & Public Affairs, 7700 Arlington Blvd, Falls Church VA. Director of Strategic Communications is key contact.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com 'Defense Health Agency' strategic communications director
leads.contractRef: Multiple DHA comms contracts — active buyer
leads.approach: DIRECT PITCH — DHA is buying now. Position Trestleboard as AI-native narrative and constituent comms vendor. Reference successful DHA comms contractor models.

leads.name: Contracting Officer / Strategic Comms Director
leads.intel: WHS manages OSD/Pentagon comms contracting. The LMI $83.4M contract EXPIRED July 2025 — WHS is actively recompeting or already has a new contract in place. WHS contracting division is at the Pentagon. Contact: WHS Acquisition Directorate for the recompete vehicle.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com 'Washington Headquarters Services' strategic communications contracting
leads.contractRef: OSD $83.4M LMI contract expired — active recompete
leads.approach: DIRECT PITCH — Offer Trestleboard as prime or sub on WHS strategic comms recompete. Lead with OSD narrative doctrine alignment and Roman's principal-level access.

leads.name: Director, USSOCOM Public Affairs
leads.intel: SOCOM PAO office at MacDill AFB, Tampa FL (local to Roman/South Florida). SOCOM.SOCO.Outreach.DL@socom.mil is public contact. SOCOM PAO oversees SOF narrative, internal comms, and community relations across all JSOC elements. Budget cycle alignment with FY2026. PSYOPs and IO are core SOCOM missions.
leads.linkedinSearch: site:linkedin.com SOCOM 'Public Affairs' director strategic communications
leads.contractRef: SOCOM PAO — MacDill AFB, Tampa FL
leads.approach: DIRECT PITCH — Geographic proximity (Tampa/South Florida). Lead with SOF operational speed framing, 200+ variant narrative production, sub-1% semantic drift. SOCOM buys comms services actively.
